description: NCSA Mosaic / 1993-web look for Micro.blog. Times New Human on white, period-correct link colors, double-rule headers, hanging Tufte-style sidenotes.

parameters.name: Tagline
parameters.description: Optional short tagline shown under the site title on the home page. Leave blank to hide.

parameters.name: Hide from search engines and AI crawlers
parameters.description: Adds a noindex/nofollow meta tag to every page. Use for private or personal blogs you don't want crawled or scraped for LLM training.

values.name: Yes, block crawlers and AI bots

parameters.name: Hide theme attribution in footer
parameters.description: By default the footer shows a small "theme: 1993" link. Set to Yes to hide it.
